initial_test_output:
=== Performance Cliff Hash Map Test ===
--- Small dataset (100 items) ---
=== Performance Benchmark (n=100) ===
Insert 100 items: 7.93 ms
Lookup 100 items: 2.30 ms (found 100)
Average lookup: 23.00 us
Small dataset: OK
--- Hash distribution analysis ---
=== Hash Distribution Analysis ===
Capacity: 16384
Size: 10000
Non-empty buckets: 10 (0.1%)
Max chain length: 1000
Avg chain length: 1000.0
WARNING: max chain length 1000 indicates severe hash collisions
Detected max chain length: 1000
FAIL: Max chain length 1000 exceeds 50 — severe hash collisions
      This indicates hashCode() is not distributing items across buckets
FAIL: Hash map has severe bucket collisions from bad hashCode()

cmd:
cat << 'EOF' > patch_cache.sh
sed -i 's/        \/\/ Extract the index from SKU format "SKU-NNNNNN"/        int hash = sku.hashCode();\n        return Math.abs(hash) % capacity;/g' /app/src/ProductCache.java
sed -i '/int index;/,/return getBucketIndex(dummy);/d' /app/src/ProductCache.java
EOF
sh patch_cache.sh
cat /app/src/ProductCache.java
